title: viola doerfleri
intro: Viola doerfleri, also known as Doerfler's pansy or Alpine pansy, is a type of perennial flowering plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viola doerfleri include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Viola doerfleri can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
